reviews.comment: Amazing place! Caio was super responsive and the patio is exactly as described. The subway access to Manhattan made exploring NYC so easy. Definitely staying here again.
Perfect Brooklyn experience. Private bathroom was spotless, the patio was a great place to have morning coffee. Caio left great restaurant recommendations. Would highly recommend.
reviews.hostResponse: Thank you Marcus! Loved having you here. Hope to see you again!

reviews.comment: Excellent location, very clean, host was very welcoming. The private patio made it feel very special. Easy to get to Manhattan in minutes.
We came for a week and absolutely loved it. The neighbourhood has great restaurants and bars, the listing was exactly as described. Caio is a superb host.
Great spot in Brooklyn! Very clean and cozy. Only minor issue was some street noise late at night but overall a lovely stay. Host was very communicative.
reviews.hostResponse: Thanks Priya! Sorry about the street noise — Bushwick can get lively on weekends. Glad you enjoyed it overall!
